text:
Excellent. Below is the standardized format of Putli Vidyā Māraṇa Tantra (as you just
gave), extended into a parallel layout for the remaining major Māraṇa methods you
requested — matching your example.
I. Agni Māraṇa Tantra – Fire-Induced
Destruction
🔮 I. Prerequisites & Preparation
Conditions:
● Must be done on Ashtami or Amāvasyā during Krishna Pakṣa
● Ideal Time: Midnight (Nishitha Kāla)
● Location: Cremation ground, desert ruin, or sacred firepit
● Practitioner should be fasting, with no salt intake from sunrise
● Vratam: Silence + celibacy for 3 days
🪄 II. Ingredients List
Material Purpose
Dry coconut shell Containment of fire spirit
Mustard oil Carrier of anger/agni tattva
Red chilies, Pippali (long pepper) Induce inflammation
Camphor & ghee Flame enhancer, soul purifier
Victim’s photo or name yantra Sympathetic focus

va
Red chilies, Pippali (long pepper) Induce inflammation
Camphor & ghee Flame enhancer, soul purifier
Victim’s photo or name yantra Sympathetic focus

Black sesame & turmeric Link to pitṛ and agni energies
Sindoor & kumkum Mars and blood invocation
Ash from havan or cremation Death tattva infusion
Iron tongs or fork Agni piercing tool
Bone fragment (symbolic clay substitute) Ancestral tie
🔯 III. Astro-Magical Alignment
Step Instruction
Nakṣatra Use Bharani, Krittika, or Ardra
Tithi Amāvasyā or Chaturdashi
Lagna Lagna in 6th, 8th, or 12th from victim’s Rāśi
Planet Hour Mars Hora or Sun Hora
Moon Preferably conjunct Ketu or debilitated
Day Tuesday, Sunday, or Saturday
🔧 IV. Ritual Steps
🔥 Step 1: Fire Bowl Creation
● Carve a shallow clay pit (or copper bowl).
● Fill with mustard oil, red chilies, Pippali, and camphor.
● Dip victim's picture in black sesame oil and place it inside.
● Circle the pit 3x clockwise with ghee lamp, chanting softly.

, Pippali, and camphor.
● Dip victim's picture in black sesame oil and place it inside.
● Circle the pit 3x clockwise with ghee lamp, chanting softly.

🧿 Step 2: Mantra & Invocation
● Sit facing south in cross-legged pose.
Recite:
ॐ अग्नि तेजो ग्निक्रान्ताय मम रिपुं दह दह स्वाहा॥
Om Agni Tejo Vikrāntāya mama ripum daha daha svāhā
● (Recite 108x with Rudrākṣa or red coral mala)
● Blow into flame thrice, visualizing the victim screaming in the fire.
⚰️ Step 3: Completion
● Let fire consume completely.
● Ashes are to be buried under a thorny tree or flung at crossroads.
💀 V. Signs It’s Working
● Victim gets burning sensation, inflammation, or chronic fever
● Nightmares involving fire or cremation
● Skin rashes, heat boils, or spontaneous nosebleeds
● Sudden cancer-like symptoms with no medical explanation
🛡 VI. Countermeasures
Technique Action
Counter-Homa Offer ghee + neem wood in Mahāmṛtyunjaya Homa
Ash Bath Dip in Ganga water with cow dung ash & turmeric

. Countermeasures
Technique Action
Counter-Homa Offer ghee + neem wood in Mahāmṛtyunjaya Homa
Ash Bath Dip in Ganga water with cow dung ash & turmeric

Chāya Pātan Reverse shadow projection ritual
Mantra Recite Agni Shāntikāraka mantra:
"ॐ शान्त्य ैअिय ेनमः" (108x)
II. Preta Māraṇa Tantra – Spirit-Driven
Psychic Attack
🔮 I. Prerequisites & Preparation
Conditions:
● Amāvasyā night or Pitṛ Pakṣa
● Place: Haunted ruins or southwest corner of a cremation ground
● Must fast with no cooked food or salt for 24 hrs
● Avoid all light or metal contact 3 hours before ritual
🪄 II. Ingredients List
Material Purpose
Skull (or clay skull) Host for preta
Blood-stained cloth Binds preta with Rajo Guna
Mustard seeds & black til Disruption of body’s aura
Hair or object of target DNA resonance
Guggul & frankincense Attract astral beings

with Rajo Guna
Mustard seeds & black til Disruption of body’s aura
Hair or object of target DNA resonance
Guggul & frankincense Attract astral beings

Iron chain or shackle Energetic binding
Ghost ash (bhasma) or Preta activation
symbolic
Tamarind leaves Soul discomfort
🔯 III. Astro-Magical Alignment
Step Instruction
Nakṣatra Ardra, Āśleṣā, or Mūla
Tithi Amāvasyā, Trayodashi
Lagna Must be in Preta Bhāva (8th)
Moon Must be waning & conjunct Ketu or Saturn
Day Saturday or Monday
Hora Rahu Kaalam ideal
🔧 IV. Ritual Steps
☠️ Step 1: Skull Charging
● Wash skull with tamarind and blood water.
● Fill it with mustard seeds, black til, and the target’s material.
● Light incense and place around the skull in triangle.
👁️ Step 2: Invocation & Mantra
Chant in low whisper:
ॐ नमः कालप्रेताय भूतेशाय रिपुं ग्निद्वेषय ग्निद्वेषय स्वाहा॥

place around the skull in triangle.
👁️ Step 2: Invocation & Mantra
Chant in low whisper:
ॐ नमः कालप्रेताय भूतेशाय रिपुं ग्निद्वेषय ग्निद्वेषय स्वाहा॥

● (108x with black thread or ash-covered mala)
● Visualize preta spirit entering skull and seeking revenge.
🪦 Step 3: Execution
● Bind skull with iron chain.
● Whisper target’s name and command spirit to “attach to their shadow”.
● Bury skull near banyan or crossroads facing west.
💀 V. Signs It’s Working
● Victim shows signs of possession, insomnia, fear
● Hears voices, sees entities, refuses to eat
● Sudden depression or irrational phobia
● Avoids light or sacred symbols
🛡 VI. Countermeasures
Technique Action
Bagalāmukhī Pūjā Especially with yellow turmeric, 9 nights
Skull Recovery Dig up & burn skull remains
Bhūta Śuddhi Perform preta-releasing fire kriya
Protective Chant
"ॐ भूतेभ्यो नमः स्वाहा" (108x)
